title: AetherPack Dark Overlay x32
description: This pack was made with the faithfull x32, with most recent minecraft version textures, 95% of the blocks texture are customised to offer a more darker and immersive universe into Skyblock
body:
# New Dark Overlay for Hypixel Skyblock 

This pack was made with the [faithfull x32](https://faithfulpack.net/) and old versions of the [original aetherpack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aetherpack-x32-for-hypixel-skyblock), with most recent minecraft version textures, 95% of the blocks texture are customised to offer a more darker and immersive universe into Skyblock.

**This Pack need to be at the top of your active texturepack because its an overlay.**

This Pack looks better with [AetherPack Texturepack for Hypixel Skyblock.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aetherpack-x32-for-hypixel-skyblock)

# Additionnal Info

So far, I have spent 400 hours making this overlay and AetherPack, as I need to find/create all the textures and make the animations work. If you wish to support this project, you can donate via my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/user/membership?u=94838233) !

Pack created by me.
